description: No rigorous a-posteriori bound is supplied that connects the finite Galerkin spectrum to the infinite-dimensional operator. The statement is purely numerical: σ_p ≥ 0.530 is observed for p ≤ 31 at N=40. A proof-relevant bound would require interval arithmetic and operator norm estimation, which are not present in the data.
action_taken: Duplicate of the Galerkin-to-operator transport bound issue. The finding page explicitly labels spectral data as numerical evidence, not rigorous bounds for the infinite-dimensional operator. This known limitation is documented in the finding's caveats section and reflected in the bronze certification level.
